This power station launched at $2,399 back in 2025, which we saw cut down to $2,199 by 2026’s start, but now that MSRP has dropped lower to $1,699, which is also the highest price we’ve seen it climb recently at Amazon. With our exclusive code plugged in, you’re getting another shot at the all-time lowest price we have tracked, giving you $274 off the new official going rate (and $574 off the former going rate). Then there’s a laptop, a work laptop, a tablet, a streaming box, a game console, maybe a router, maybe a smart TV, and suddenly the “five devices should be enough” logic falls apart. FastestVPN PRO at just $39.99 for a limited time (reg. $600) is easier to picture in that kind of setup because it covers up to 15 devices, which is a much less fantasy-based number.

items.summary:
ECOVACS – one of my personal favorite robot cleaner brands – unleashed its new DEEBOT X12 OmniCyclone robot vac and mop system this year, and I have now had a chance to put it to the test. I have, generally speaking, come away quite impressed once again, with a few minor grips on the dust bin design and new stain removing prowess, and I’m not sure it’s worth the upgrade for folks with a relatively modern solution already, but I think this is a vacuum worth consideration for just about anyone looking to get into the flagship robot cleaning space – it is also $250 off right now.
